dashboard.label: Overview
dashboard.description: Landing overview for the local DefenseClaw and OpenClaw observability app.

html.p: This overview brings together the local investigation workflow across audit, gateway logs, diagnostics, metrics, traces, alerts, and guided drilldowns for DefenseClaw and OpenClaw activity.

This app is moving toward a broader observability model with audit, gateway logs, diagnostics, metrics, traces, alerts, and guided drilldowns. The current local baseline is centered on DefenseClaw audit telemetry.

search.query: `defenseclaw_run_session_base` | search run_id!="(unknown)" | stats dc(run_id) as recent_runs
`defenseclaw_audit_base` | stats count by severity | sort - count
`defenseclaw_audit_base` | stats count by action | sort - count | head 10
`defenseclaw_run_session_base` | search session_id!="(unknown)" | stats dc(session_id) as recent_sessions
`defenseclaw_run_inventory` | table run_id session_id count first_seen last_seen actions severities | head 12
`defenseclaw_notable_audit` | table timestamp run_id session_id action severity actor target details | sort - timestamp | head 12
`defenseclaw_audit_base` | table timestamp run_id session_id action severity actor target details | sort - timestamp | head 20

| makeresults count=4 | streamstats count as row | eval section=case(row=1, "Audit and Security", row=2, "Runs and Sessions", row=3, "Search and Drilldown", row=4, "Queue and Runtime Health"), purpose=case(row=1, "Review deny, enforcement, severity, and notable audit activity.", row=2, "Pivot by run_id and session_id to reconstruct one investigation timeline.", row=3, "Use guided searches for run inventory, control actions, and missing telemetry.", row=4, "Validate ingest freshness now and queue or diagnostics signals in later phases.") | table section purpose
